formulas.formula: Gross profit = Revenue - Cost of revenue
Total operating expenses = Research and development + Sales, general and administrative + Acquisition termination cost
formulas.operation: Research and development + Sales, general and administrative + Acquisition termination cost

formulas.formula: Operating income = Gross profit - Total operating expenses
Other income (expense), net = Interest income - Interest expense + Other, net
formulas.operation: Interest income - Interest expense + Other, net

formulas.formula: Income before income tax = Operating income + Other income (expense), net
Net income = Income before income tax - Income tax expense (benefit)
formulas.operation: Income before income tax - Income tax expense (benefit)

formulas.formula: Total current assets = Cash and cash equivalents + Marketable securities + Accounts receivable, net + Inventories + Prepaid expenses and other current assets
components: Prepaid expenses and other current assets
formulas.operation: Cash and cash equivalents + Marketable securities + Accounts receivable, net + Inventories + Prepaid expenses and other current assets

formulas.formula: Total assets = Total current assets + Property and equipment, net + Operating lease assets + Goodwill + Intangible assets, net + Deferred income tax assets + Other assets
formulas.operation: Total current assets + Property and equipment, net + Operating lease assets + Goodwill + Intangible assets, net + Deferred income tax assets + Other assets

formulas.formula: Total current liabilities = Accounts payable + Accrued and other current liabilities + Short-term debt
formulas.operation: Accounts payable + Accrued and other current liabilities + Short-term debt

formulas.formula: Total liabilities = Total current liabilities + Long-term debt + Long-term operating lease liabilities + Other long-term liabilities
formulas.operation: Total current liabilities + Long-term debt + Long-term operating lease liabilities + Other long-term liabilities

formulas.formula: Total shareholders equity = Preferred stock + Common stock + Additional paid-in capital + Accumulated other comprehensive loss + Retained earnings
formulas.operation: Preferred stock + Common stock + Additional paid-in capital + Accumulated other comprehensive loss + Retained earnings

formulas.formula: Total liabilities and shareholders equity = Total liabilities + Commitments and contingencies + Total shareholders equity

formulas.formula: Net cash provided by operating activities = Net income + Stock-based compensation expense + Depreciation and amortization - Losses on investments in non-affiliates + Deferred income taxes + Acquisition termination cost - Other - Accounts receivable - Inventories - Prepaid expenses and other assets + Accounts payable + Accrued and other current liabilities + Other long-term liabilities
components: Net cash provided by operating activities
formulas.operation: Net income + Stock-based compensation expense + Depreciation and amortization - Losses on investments in non-affiliates + Deferred income taxes + Acquisition termination cost - Other - Accounts receivable - Inventories - Prepaid expenses and other assets + Accounts payable + Accrued and other current liabilities + Other long-term liabilities
formulas.result_label: Net cash provided by operating activities

formulas.formula: Net cash provided by (used in) investing activities = Proceeds from maturities of marketable securities + Proceeds from sales of marketable securities - Purchases of marketable securities - Purchases related to property and equipment and intangible assets - Acquisitions, net of cash acquired - Investments in non-affiliates and other, net
components: Proceeds from maturities of marketable securities
Proceeds from sales of marketable securities
Purchases related to property and equipment and intangible assets
Investments in non-affiliates and other, net
Net cash provided by (used in) investing activities
formulas.operation: Proceeds from maturities of marketable securities + Proceeds from sales of marketable securities + Purchases of marketable securities - Purchases related to property and equipment and intangible assets - Acquisitions, net of cash acquired + Investments in non-affiliates and other, net
formulas.result_label: Net cash provided by (used in) investing activities

formulas.formula: Net cash used in financing activities = Proceeds related to employee stock plans - Payments related to repurchases of common stock - Repayment of debt - Payments related to tax on restricted stock units - Dividends paid - Principal payments on property and equipment and intangible assets + Other
components: Proceeds related to employee stock plans
Payments related to repurchases of common stock
Payments related to tax on restricted stock units
Principal payments on property and equipment and intangible assets
Net cash used in financing activities
formulas.operation: Proceeds related to employee stock plans + Payments related to repurchases of common stock - Repayment of debt - Payments related to tax on restricted stock units - Dividends paid - Principal payments on property and equipment and intangible assets + Other
formulas.result_label: Net cash used in financing activities

formulas.formula: Change in cash = Net cash provided by operating activities + Net cash provided by (used in) investing activities + Net cash used in financing activities
components: Net cash provided by operating activities
Net cash provided by (used in) investing activities
Net cash used in financing activities
Change in cash, cash equivalents, and restricted cash
formulas.operation: Net cash provided by operating activities + Net cash provided by (used in) investing activities + Net cash used in financing activities
formulas.result_label: Change in cash, cash equivalents, and restricted cash

xbrl_not_on_statement.classification: Supplemental lease cash flow disclosure in Note 3, not on face of cash flow statement
Non-cash operating lease supplemental disclosure in Note 3, not on face of cash flow statement

cross_statement_checks.check: Net income Q3 FY2024 matches between income statement and cash flow statement
Net income nine months FY2024 matches between income statement and cash flow statement
Cash and cash equivalents end of period matches between balance sheet and cash flow statement for October 29, 2023
Cash and cash equivalents beginning of period in cash flow matches balance sheet January 29, 2023
Marketable securities balance sheet matches marketable securities in cash flow supplemental disclosure (Note 7)
Net income nine months FY2023 matches between income statement and cash flow statement
Total assets equals total liabilities plus total shareholders equity at October 29, 2023
Total assets equals total liabilities plus total shareholders equity at January 29, 2023

formula_checks.formula: Gross profit = Revenue - Cost of revenue
Total operating expenses = Research and development + Sales, general and administrative + Acquisition termination cost
Operating income = Gross profit - Total operating expenses
Other income (expense), net = Interest income - Interest expense + Other, net
Income before income tax = Operating income + Other income (expense), net
Net income = Income before income tax - Income tax expense (benefit)
Total current assets = Cash and cash equivalents + Marketable securities + Accounts receivable, net + Inventories + Prepaid expenses and other current assets
Total assets = Total current assets + Property and equipment, net + Operating lease assets + Goodwill + Intangible assets, net + Deferred income tax assets + Other assets
Total current liabilities = Accounts payable + Accrued and other current liabilities + Short-term debt
Total liabilities = Total current liabilities + Long-term debt + Long-term operating lease liabilities + Other long-term liabilities
Total shareholders equity = Preferred stock + Common stock + Additional paid-in capital + Accumulated other comprehensive loss + Retained earnings
Total liabilities and shareholders equity = Total liabilities + Commitments and contingencies + Total shareholders equity

Net cash provided by operating activities = Net income + Stock-based compensation expense + Depreciation and amortization - Losses on investments in non-affiliates + Deferred income taxes + Acquisition termination cost - Other - Accounts receivable - Inventories - Prepaid expenses and other assets + Accounts payable + Accrued and other current liabilities + Other long-term liabilities

Net cash provided by (used in) investing activities = Proceeds from maturities of marketable securities + Proceeds from sales of marketable securities - Purchases of marketable securities - Purchases related to property and equipment and intangible assets - Acquisitions, net of cash acquired - Investments in non-affiliates and other, net

Net cash used in financing activities = Proceeds related to employee stock plans - Payments related to repurchases of common stock - Repayment of debt - Payments related to tax on restricted stock units - Dividends paid - Principal payments on property and equipment and intangible assets + Other
Change in cash = Net cash provided by operating activities + Net cash provided by (used in) investing activities + Net cash used in financing activities
